name: feishu-markdown-uploader
description: Convert local Markdown files with images into Feishu docs through a local MCP server.

interface.shortDescription: Upload local Markdown into Feishu docs with images preserved.
interface.longDescription: Turns a local Markdown file into a DOCX with embedded images, uploads it to Feishu Drive, then imports it as a Feishu doc and returns the document link.
defaultPrompt: Upload this Markdown file to Feishu as a doc.
Convert my local Markdown and keep its images.
Create a Feishu doc from this report file.
